free_text: Astrophysical S factor for proton capture on 147Sm and
Experimental setup and entire experimental process
The accuracy of thickness for Sm targets has not been
evaluated yet. It will be provided in near future.
Two samarium interspaced by Al foils (~80 um)
Sm targets were separated by Al foils of
different thicknesses (80, 10 and 2 um), in order to
catch the recoils and to degrade the proton energy.
- Decay data were taken from the ENSDF library.
- Cu was irradiated to verify the current integration,
not used for renormalization of Sm cross section.
All provided values are absolute cross sections.
